blocks.text: Ruud Eyes Madrid Glory as Real Fight for La Liga Title

Monday rolls into a big week for Norwegian sport fans. Casper Ruud opens his Mutua Madrid Open campaign on home clay territory — and Real Madrid must deliver against Alavés to keep Barcelona's lead from widening further.
🎾 Mutua Madrid Open 2026 kicks off — Casper Ruud tees up on premier clay, tuning for Roland Garros
⚽ West Ham United at Crystal Palace — Selhurst Park survival battle, both sides desperate for PL points
